content.title: Why Traditional FP&A Is Broken in 2026
content.body: Your team spends 80% on data plumbing and 20% on decisions. Agents flip that ratio.

content.title: FP&A Agent Architecture
content.body: Get the foundation wrong and nothing above it works — no matter how sophisticated the analysis.

content.title: Building Rolling Forecast Agents
content.body: The rolling forecast is the single highest-value finance agent you can build.

content.title: P&L Automation Agents
content.body: Month-end close that took three days now takes four hours. The analysis stays. The drudgery disappears.

content.title: Cash Flow Prediction Agents
content.body: You can survive a bad quarter on the P&L. You cannot survive running out of cash.

content.title: Real-Time Budget Variance Detection
content.body: Real-time variance detection is $250K-$1M in annual cash driven straight to the bottom line.

content.title: Bring this playbook into your operation.
content.body: Search "AI Agents for CFOs — Mangum" on Amazon
